Pre-Departure Checklist

Everything to do before June 5, 2026

planning
checklist
NoteAlready Booked — Do Not Re-Book
  • ✅ Outbound flights (FMWYOJ): MSN → ORD → Frankfurt → Florence, Jun 5–6
  • ✅ Return flights (FMWYOJ): Brindisi → Munich → Chicago → Madison, Jun 20
  • ✅ Florence → Naples train (PIDCMA): Italo #8902, Jun 10, departs 12:28pm, arrives 3:28pm — Salotto 1, seats 1 & 2
  • ✅ Naples → Brindisi flights (IXYZMT): AZ 1270 NAP→FCO 3:05pm + AZ 1623 FCO→BDS 5:15pm, Jun 13

Museum & Attraction Tickets

Book these as soon as possible — June is peak season and timed slots fill weeks ahead.

Florence (Days 3–5, Jun 7–9)

Priority Attraction Day Date Cost
🔴 Book Now Duomo Complex combo (dome climb) Day 3 Sun Jun 7 €30
🔴 Book Now Uffizi Gallery (timed entry) Day 3 Sun Jun 7 ~€20
🔴 Book Now Galleria dell’Accademia (David) Day 4 Mon Jun 8 €20 + €4 booking
🟡 Soon Medici Chapels Day 4 Mon Jun 8 ~€9
🟢 Optional Basilica di San Lorenzo / Laurentian Library Day 4 Mon Jun 8 Varies
🟢 Optional Palazzo Vecchio Day 4 Mon Jun 8 ~€14
🟢 Optional Museum of San Marco Day 4 or 5 Mon–Tue €4 (closed Tues)

See: Florence Tickets page for booking links

Naples (Days 7–9, Jun 11–13)

Priority Attraction Day Date Cost
🔴 Book Now Cappella Sansevero (Veiled Christ) Day 8 Fri Jun 12 €9
🟡 Soon Herculaneum (Parco Archeologico) Day 7 Thu Jun 11 ~€13
🟡 Soon MANN Museum Day 8 Fri Jun 12 €18
🟢 Optional Napoli Sotterranea (10am slot) Day 9 morning Sat Jun 13 ~€10
WarningCappella Sansevero — Book Immediately

This tiny chapel (Veiled Christ sculpture) has extremely limited timed slots and sells out weeks in advance. Book before anything else on this list.

See: Naples Tickets page for booking links

Accommodations

Confirm all hotel bookings, check-in times, and checkout deadlines.

City Check-In Check-Out Nights Note
Florence Sat Jun 6 ~7:00pm Wed Jun 10 (morning) 4 Train departs 12:28pm — check out by 11am
Naples Wed Jun 10 ~4:00pm Sat Jun 13 (morning) 3 Flight at 3pm — check out by noon; ask for luggage storage
Brindisi/Puglia Sat Jun 13 ~7:30pm Sat Jun 20 (~8am) 6 BDS flight 10:55am — depart hotel by 8:15am

Tours

Restaurant Reservations

June is busy — reserve ahead for any restaurant worth going to.

Florence

Naples
